title: taraxacum strizhoviae
intro: Taraxacum strizhoviae, also known as Strizh's dandelion, is a rare species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is commonly used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing liver toxicity, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Taraxacum strizhoviae is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its roots can also be dried and used in capsules or powder form.
